project.name: employee-clock-improved
project.description: EasyClock - Simple, secure, on-chain employee clock in/out app using local wallets and geofenced smart contract on opBNB testnet.

tech_stack.web3: viem + local private key (stored in localStorage)

key_directories.src/pages: Route pages (Dashboard, Login, Roster, Timesheet, Swaps, About)
key_directories.src/web3: Blockchain interaction layer (write.js is most important)

core_files.description: Main component. Handles wallet creation, geolocation, clock in/out, QR code, and site config loading.
core_files.last_major_change: Refactored error handling and geofence messaging

core_files.description: Contains all viem logic: contract calls, ABI, getSiteConfig(), clockInOut(), balance checks.
Simple auth context with local wallet persistence.
Main landing page that renders CheckInCard.
Employee guide page with README essentials: wallet creation, clock in/out steps, geofence rules, security, troubleshooting, and contract details.
core_files.last_major_change: Added in-app About & Instructions page for daily clocking

key_features: No built-in cooldown (handled in app if needed)

current_state.wallet: Local wallet stored in localStorage under key 'ec_pk'. Never exposed to user.
current_state.geofence: Fully enforced on-chain. Frontend shows improved error messages.
current_state.clock_logic: Must clock out before clocking in again. No time-based cooldown implemented yet.
known_issues: Nested folder problems when unzipping (user experience issue)
Some deprecated dependencies from base template
No shift cooldown enforcement in frontend yet
current_state.recommended_workflow: Use patch files instead of full zips. See docs/operator_workflow.md

recommended_next_steps: Implement optional 9-hour cooldown in the app layer
Create manager dashboard for approving/funding wallets
DONE: Added in-app About & Instructions page with clocking essentials and README-style guide
